title: Unable to start container
body:
### Issue Description

Hello, TL;DR im planing to switch to immutable distro, so im testing how I will work, so I created dev image using Docker file, and created container using podman, when I try to enter it I get error:

```
╰─ distrobox enter devbox                                                    ─╯
Error: unable to start container "0c0fb41eb91d5ee01209d811de77e235c3c51f2f46b61d26ce16e6cfab57803c": runc: runc create failed: unable to start container process: error during container init: error mounting "/run/user/1000/containers/overlay-containers/0c0fb41eb91d5ee01209d811de77e235c3c51f2f46b61d26ce16e6cfab57803c/userdata/.containerenv" to rootfs at "/run/.containerenv": create mountpoint for /run/.containerenv mount: create target of file bind-mount: mknod regular file /home/tomsk/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/0e9ccd3b103402f680f23c2fa6a9db24c39530bf071565b3f49473f9f6063caf/merged/run/.containerenv: permission denied: OCI permission denied
```

This is my Makefile:

```
IMAGE_NAME = localhost/devbox-image
CONTAINER_NAME = devbox

rebuild-devbox-image:
	@echo "🧽 Odstránenie existujúceho distrobox kontajnera (ak existuje)..."
	-@distrobox rm -f $(CONTAINER_NAME)
	
	@echo "🧹 Čistenie podman systémových dát..."
	@podman container prune -f
	@podman image prune -a -f
	@podman system prune -f

	@echo "📦 Build Docker image..."
	@podman build -t $(IMAGE_NAME) -f Dockerfile

	@echo "📦 Vytváranie nového distrobox kontajnera..."
	@distrobox create --yes --name $(CONTAINER_NAME) --image $(IMAGE_NAME) --nvidia --volume /run/:/run/
```
Yes I know that Im attaching /run/ volume, why? Because I said that this container is for development and there are many files / sockets which I need during development, for example `/run/dbus`, or `/run/user/1000/discord-rpc` and I cannot just mount discord-rpc because it doesn't have to be installed or may not be running, so I would like to include whole /run/ directory to be accessible for dev container.

podman version:
```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      5.5.2
API Version:  5.5.2
Go Version:   go1.24.4
Git Commit:   e7d8226745ba07a64b7176a7f128e4ef53225a0e
Built:        Fri Jun 27 10:15:44 2025
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

comments.body:
**Update:**

I read somewhere that `runc` cannot "gain" permissions from user (according to this issue: https://github.com/89luca89/distrobox/issues/622) so I installed `crun`:

```
podman info | grep -A3 "ociRuntime"
  ociRuntime:
    name: crun
    package: crun-1.23.1-1
    path: /usr/bin/crun
```
and it didnt solve issue.

I have same issue with `vboxusb` too, but I use temporary workaround that I run `chmod -R 777 /dev/vboxusb` and it solve issue temporally.

```
Error: unable to start container "7fd16dd310587b2b548bdc9ce7a1c56a8dd57fb77a6990dfb766ed84c5727860": runc: runc create failed: unable to start container process: error during container init: error mounting "/dev/vboxusb/003/004" to rootfs at "/dev/vboxusb/003/004": create mountpoint for /dev/vboxusb/003/004 mount: lstat /home/tomsk/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/75d241d2c92bf746e3e714351ff956faeaefb8af86768d28fd3710112f486eae/merged//dev/vboxusb/003: permission denied: OCI permission denied
```

```
groups tomsk
tomsk : users wheel input kvm video libvirt plugdev vboxusers docker tomsk


ll /dev/vboxusb/
Permissions Size User Date Modified Name
drwxr-x---     - root  5 Aug 12:02  003
drwxr-x---     - root  5 Aug 12:02  005
```
Is your `/home` immutable? What do the file permissions on `/home/tomsk/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay` look like?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
